title: dolophragma globiflorum
intro: Dolophragma globiflorum, also known as the Globe-flowered Dolophragma, is a flowering plant species in the family Menispermaceae, native to the tropical regions of Africa and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dolophragma globiflorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Dolophragma globiflorum include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
